pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Edge-domain Data Governance KSA with insufficient signal strength (composite score 0.424) to justify inclusion for the AI Innovation Lead. Without stronger framework alignment, this task KSA does not meet the inclusion threshold.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No internal inconsistency identified. Domain scope, seniority fit, and signal level are internally consistent with exclusion.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Could this edge-domain task KSA be expected in real-world AI Innovation Lead roles, even if not core to the role definition?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Recent job postings for AI Innovation Lead roles increasingly include Data Governance competencies as organizations broaden role scope. External evidence supports inclusion.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Overturn: evolving market expectations for AI Innovation Lead now include Data Governance competencies. Revised to include.

decision_rationale: Initially excluded but overturned through adversarial review. Data Governance task KSA is relevant to the AI Innovation Lead based on external evidence and internal consistency re-evaluation.
